gist.headline: Pipe it up!
gist.blurb: The Polli CLI now accepts piped auth tokens directly from stdin. Automating your hive just got a whole lot smoother.
gist.summary: Added support for passing authentication tokens via stdin to the Polli CLI using the new `--with-token` flag.
gist.impact: Developers can now easily automate CLI authentication in CI/CD pipelines or scripts by piping their API keys directly.
gist.visual_concept: Piping data into a terminal. Polly the bee acting as a tiny engineer connecting a glowing data pipe to a retro computer, representing stdin piping.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny yellow hardhat, connecting a glowing lime green (#ecf874) pipe into a retro terminal. The chunky monitor robot watches happily as glowing pixel data flows through the pipe. Soft pastel gradient background with warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
